rationale: Section 48.1581 establishes a per-student support staff retention allotment based on adjusted average attendance. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: A school district is entitled to an annual allotment of $45 for each student in adjusted average attendance.
_note: No direct textual link between Educ. Code §48.1581 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Indirect effects on school finance formulas are outside this rule's operative text.
